title: import: allow users to set `--os`, `--arch` and `--variant` of image imports
body:
Allows users to set `--os` , `--arch` and `--variant` of the image
created from the custom import.

Following is useful when user is already aware of the values which are
correct for the rootfs which is being imported

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13291

comments.body: Tests are still pretty red looking @flouthoc
